programme.title: My Heart Is Rest Assured
programme.desc: Through Ghayth's eyes, the world becomes a map of resilience, where every place he visits reveals people struggling, hoping, and pushing forward to build a better life, and reminds us that goodness is still alive. Ghayth.

programme.title: Divination
programme.desc: When Hasan, a car body repairman with formidable fighting skills, crosses paths with a singer on the run after witnessing a crime by a powerful figure, he is drawn into a fight to protect her and bring the truth to light. Abeer Sabry, Nisreen Amin, Ahmed Abd Al Aziz, Ahmed Wafiq.

programme.title: Ali Kelay
programme.desc: With a noble heart and steady courage, Ali Kelay gives his fight winnings to charity and oversees his adoptive father's auto parts business, though his rise creates enemies in the market and ignites jealousy within his family. Ahmed Al Awady, Dorra Zarrouq.

programme.title: Al Nouman's Daughter
programme.desc: In the heart of Damascus, a controlling tycoon traps his daughter in a gilded cage of love and obsession, while she schemes to break free, sparking darkly comic clashes between power and freedom. Salloum Haddad, Riam Kafarneh.

programme.title: Maximum Limit
programme.desc: When a huge sum of money is deposited into Sabah's bank account, she suddenly finds herself accused of money laundering , which puts her in trouble with a dangerous gang. If this were not enough, her married life is also put to a difficult test. Rogena, Mohamed Al Qass.

programme.title: Al Raey's Sons
programme.desc: An empire trembles when three brothers are targeted for assassination simultaneously, unraveling decades of carefully maintained peace, bringing old rivalries and dangerous secrets into the open, and compelling every member of the realm. Maged Al Masry, Khaled Al Sawy.

programme.title: Waves
programme.desc: Debate Discussing social and family issues to analyze risk factors and behavioral patterns that threaten family ties and community structures with the help of experts and researchers. Amira Mohamed, Alan Ghafry, Amira Mohamad.

programme.title: My Heart Is Rest Assured
programme.desc: Through Ghayth's eyes, the world becomes a map of resilience, where every place he visits reveals people struggling, hoping, and pushing forward to build a better life, and reminds us that goodness is still alive. Ghayth.

programme.title: People Of Generousity
programme.desc: People Inspiring human stories and extraordinary experiences that touch hearts, uniting them through unforgettable journeys of hope and resilience.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Moudi
programme.desc: The world of wealthy womanizer Mahmoud Al Wakeel collapses after a financial crisis costs him his fortune and lavish lifestyle, forcing him to face numerous funny and dramatic situations with those around him and those gloating over his misfortune. Yasser Galal, Mervat Amin.

programme.title: Al Nouman's Daughter
programme.desc: In the heart of Damascus, a controlling tycoon traps his daughter in a gilded cage of love and obsession, while she schemes to break free, sparking darkly comic clashes between power and freedom. Salloum Haddad, Riam Kafarneh.

programme.title: The News
programme.desc: Investigation Presenting the latest Arab and international developments in politics and economics and providing news reports and opinions of experts and specialists on significant events.

programme.title: The Recipe's Secret
programme.desc: Show Presenting delicious ways to prepare healthy food, and different kinds of diet for those who want to lose weight.

programme.title: Voices Of The Throats
programme.desc: Show Distinctive recitations of the Holy Quran by the best and most distinguished voices in the United Arab Emirates, sponsored by the General Authority of Islamic Affairs in the country.

programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Honest conversations arise from the details of everyday life, bringing together people and experts to discuss daily challenges, share experiences and perspectives, and gain a deeper understanding of these issues.

programme.title: Minutes
programme.desc: Show In just a few minutes, the most significant scientific achievements and technological innovations around the world are discussed. It also explains some scientific phenomena and terms so that non-specialized people can understand.

programme.title: They Followed The Steps
programme.desc: People Exploring the careers and accomplishments of prominent Emirati personalities, sharing their exceptional success stories that have shaped the nation's vision for the future and driven improvement and development in most fields.

programme.desc: People Inspiring human stories and extraordinary experiences that touch hearts, uniting them through unforgettable journeys of hope and resilience.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Moudi
programme.desc: The world of wealthy womanizer Mahmoud Al Wakeel collapses after a financial crisis costs him his fortune and lavish lifestyle, forcing him to face numerous funny and dramatic situations with those around him and those gloating over his misfortune. Yasser Galal, Mervat Amin.

programme.title: Al Nouman's Daughter
programme.desc: In the heart of Damascus, a controlling tycoon traps his daughter in a gilded cage of love and obsession, while she schemes to break free, sparking darkly comic clashes between power and freedom. Salloum Haddad, Riam Kafarneh.

programme.title: Maximum Limit
programme.desc: When a huge sum of money is deposited into Sabah's bank account, she suddenly finds herself accused of money laundering , which puts her in trouble with a dangerous gang. If this were not enough, her married life is also put to a difficult test. Rogena, Mohamed Al Qass.

programme.title: The News
programme.desc: Investigation Presenting the latest Arab and international developments in politics and economics and providing news reports and opinions of experts and specialists on significant events.

programme.title: The Recipe's Secret
programme.desc: Show Presenting delicious ways to prepare healthy food, and different kinds of diet for those who want to lose weight.

programme.title: The Lectures Of Mohamed Bin Zayed Council
programme.desc: People A group of distinguished thinkers and experts come to the UAE to give several lectures tackling some essential issues. They highlight the women's economic empowerment and their role in the society.

programme.title: Voices Of The Throats
programme.desc: Show Distinctive recitations of the Holy Quran by the best and most distinguished voices in the United Arab Emirates, sponsored by the General Authority of Islamic Affairs in the country.

programme.title: Our Houses
programme.desc: Honest conversations arise from the details of everyday life, bringing together people and experts to discuss daily challenges, share experiences and perspectives, and gain a deeper understanding of these issues.

programme.desc: Through Ghayth's eyes, the world becomes a map of resilience, where every place he visits reveals people struggling, hoping, and pushing forward to build a better life, and reminds us that goodness is still alive. Ghayth.

programme.title: مدرسة الحب ج2
programme.desc: دمج الجزء الثاني والثالث معا، في عرض واحد وتم عرض الحلقة الأولى في الاول من أغسطس 2020، بالجزء الثالث.

programme.title: اختفاء
programme.desc: تدور الأحداث حول دكتورة جامعية في روسيا، وتعيش مع زوجها هناك، لكن فجأة وبدون مقدمات يختفي زوجها، لتبدأ رحلة البحث عنه، ويصل بها الأمر للعودة إلى مصر في إطار رحلة بحثها، لكن هذه الرحلة تفاجئها بالكثير من الأمور التي لم تكن على علم بها. A university professor lives in Russia with her husband. When he suddenly disappears, she goes on a journey to find him. As her search takes her to Egypt, she finds out things that she had never known before.

programme.title: كأنه إمبارح
programme.desc: تعيش أسرة في مأساة تستمر لسنوات بعد اختطاف ابنهم (علي) خلال عطلة قامو بها على الشاطيء، وبعد سنوات طويلة، يظهر (علي) من جديد في حياتهم، لكن هذا الظهور المفاجيء يفجر العديد من التساؤلات، وعلى رأسها: هل هذا الشاب هو (علي) فعلًا. A family lives through a tragedy that goes on for years after their son, Ali, gets kidnapped at the beach. After years, Ali reappears in their lives, causing lots of questions to arise, with the main question being: is it really Ali.

programme.title: سره الباتع
programme.desc: ما بين الماضي والحاضر، تدور أحداث المسلسل حول السلطان حامد، وهو بطل شعبي ومجاهد في وقت الحملة الفرنسية يتحول لأسطورة لها أضرحة ومقامات في العديد من قرى مصر، وفي ذات الوقت حامد - صانع حلي- يكرس حياته لكشف سر السلطان ويجد نفسه هاربا من عصابات تهريب آثار. Between the past and the present, the events of the series follow Sultan Hamed, a popular hero at the time of the French campaign who turns into a legend that has shrines in many villages of Egypt. At the same time, Hamed, a jewelry maker, devotes his life to revealing the sultan's secret and finds himself fleeing from antiquity smugglers.

programme.title: ضرب نار
programme.desc: بعد أن يسافر جابر من الصعيد إلى القاهرة بسبب الثأر، يلقيه القدر في طريق مهرة، السيدة المكافحة التي تربي شقيقيها، وتنشأ بينهما قصة حب يتحديان بها ظروفهما الصعبة. After Jaber travels from Upper Egypt to Cairo because of revenge, fate throws him in the path of Mohra, the struggling woman who is raising her two brothers, and a love story arises between them, through which they challenge their difficult circumstances.

programme.title: سبع أرواح (7 أرواح)
programme.desc: يلقي ضابط شرطة القبض علي أحد كبار رجال الدولة بعد تورطه في قتل امرأة، ويحكم عليه بالإعدام، ثم يتقدم ضابط الشرطة باستقالته، وأثناء عودته للمنزل بعد تقدمه بالاستقالة مباشرة، تأتي له مكالمة هاتفية تغيّر مجري حياته حيث تقول السيدة التي تُحدثِّه عبر الهاتف بأنها مازالت علي قيد الحياة وأنه تسبب في إعدام رجل بريء، ليدخل بعدها هذا الضابط في مطاردة مستمرة مع أتباع رجل الدولة الذي حكم عليه بالإعدام. A police officer arrests a man who happens to be a powerful individual within the society. The man is convicted for being involved in murder, and gets the death sentence. The police officer then gets a phone call from the supposedly murdered woman saying that she's alive. This results in a chase between the police officer and the convicted man's men.

programme.title: كأنه إمبارح
programme.desc: تعيش أسرة في مأساة تستمر لسنوات بعد اختطاف ابنهم (علي) خلال عطلة قامو بها على الشاطيء، وبعد سنوات طويلة، يظهر (علي) من جديد في حياتهم، لكن هذا الظهور المفاجيء يفجر العديد من التساؤلات، وعلى رأسها: هل هذا الشاب هو (علي) فعلًا. A family lives through a tragedy that goes on for years after their son, Ali, gets kidnapped at the beach. After years, Ali reappears in their lives, causing lots of questions to arise, with the main question being: is it really Ali.

programme.title: اختفاء
programme.desc: تدور الأحداث حول دكتورة جامعية في روسيا، وتعيش مع زوجها هناك، لكن فجأة وبدون مقدمات يختفي زوجها، لتبدأ رحلة البحث عنه، ويصل بها الأمر للعودة إلى مصر في إطار رحلة بحثها، لكن هذه الرحلة تفاجئها بالكثير من الأمور التي لم تكن على علم بها. A university professor lives in Russia with her husband. When he suddenly disappears, she goes on a journey to find him. As her search takes her to Egypt, she finds out things that she had never known before.

programme.title: ضرب نار
programme.desc: بعد أن يسافر جابر من الصعيد إلى القاهرة بسبب الثأر، يلقيه القدر في طريق مهرة، السيدة المكافحة التي تربي شقيقيها، وتنشأ بينهما قصة حب يتحديان بها ظروفهما الصعبة. After Jaber travels from Upper Egypt to Cairo because of revenge, fate throws him in the path of Mohra, the struggling woman who is raising her two brothers, and a love story arises between them, through which they challenge their difficult circumstances.

programme.title: معكم منى الشاذلي
programme.desc: برنامج أسبوعي منوع، تلتقي فيه منى الشاذلي بالناس بعيدًا عن زحام الأحداث اليومية وتوتر الأخبار المتلاحقة، لتنقل لهم حكايات حقيقية لم يشاهدوها أو يسمعوها من قبل الأبطال وشخصيات تستحق اﻹحترام. A weekly diverse talk show, where Mona Al Shazly meets with people away from the tension of daily news and events, to present her audience with original and genuine stories they have never heard of before, about people and heroes who deserve respect and admiration.

programme.title: The Beautiful And The Bad
programme.desc: Caught in a family locked in an old feud, a young woman seeks her own identity away from their control. She pursues a university education, where she meets a professor who believes destiny is made, not inherited. Humayun Saeed, Sajal Ali.

programme.title: Me Or You
programme.desc: A heartwarming love story unfolds between two complete opposites: an intelligent, book-loving, and academically successful girl with a pragmatic outlook on life and a carefree, easygoing guy who prefers to go with the flow. Fahad Mustafa, Hania Aamir, Emmad Irfani, Bushra Ansari, Jawed Sheikh, Naeema Naeem Butt, Badar Mehmood, Farhat Ishtiaq.

programme.title: Shahid
programme.desc: Leaving military service behind, Shahid Azmi enters the world of criminal law, shouldering the fight for innocents ensnared by terrorism accusations. Hansal Mehta, Sameer Gautam Singh, Rajkummar Rao, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub, Baljinder Kaur, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Prabhleen Sandhu.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt officer does whatever it takes to break the law no matter what the consequences are. Ranveer Singh, Sara Ali Khan, Sonu Sood, Ashutosh Rana, Siddarth Jadhav, Vaidehi Parshurami, Rohit Shetty, Puri Jagannadh.

programme.title: Koffee With Karan
programme.desc: Karan invites all the celebrity couples for coffee and exploits the moment to ask about their personal life, providing the audience a deep look at the life of their favorite stars. Karan Johar, Karan Johar.

programme.title: She Looks Great
programme.desc: Priya lives in her family home with her mother and sisters. She suffers in her life and believes that there is no place for love in her, after her lover left her to marry her sister. Nakuul Mehta, Disha Parmar, Amit Singh Thakur, Rohan Kapoor, Alefia Kapadia, Jyoti Tiwari, Ekta Kapoor, Sahir Raza, Reena Aggarwal, Pranveer Singh.

programme.title: She Looks Great
programme.desc: Priya lives in her family home with her mother and sisters. She suffers in her life and believes that there is no place for love in her, after her lover left her to marry her sister. Nakuul Mehta, Disha Parmar, Amit Singh Thakur, Rohan Kapoor, Alefia Kapadia, Jyoti Tiwari, Ekta Kapoor, Sahir Raza.

programme.title: Radd
programme.desc: A complex and challenging dynamic unfolds between the hardworking and responsible Eman, the wealthy Salaar, and Zain, a stable man preparing for marriage. Just as Eman is about to marry Zain, things become complicated, and she falls in love with Salaar. Sheheryar Munawar, Hiba Bukhari.

programme.desc: A story is about a serial killer always follows the steps of another one in the sixties, and stalks the cop who tries to arrest him to prove that they're similar. Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Vicky Kaushal, Sobhita Dhulipala, Mukesh Chhabra, Vipin Sharma, Anurag Kashyap, Anurag Kashyap.

programme.title: Jalebi
programme.desc: On a train trip from Mumbai to Delhi the book writer, Ashia meets her ex-husband with his family. It becomes an emotional-tear trip as they reflect on their past relationship. Pushpdeep Bhardwaj, Kausar Munir, Suhrita Sengupta, Rhea Chakraborty, Varun Mitra, Digangana Suryavanshi.

programme.title: Spark
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman enters a household ruled by three rival wives and outdated customs, sparking a chain of events that ignites a full-blown family war and exposes long-hidden secrets. Bakr Khalid, Sulaf Jalil.

programme.title: Release
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murdering his wife, Abbas Al Rayes is sentenced to fifteen years in prison. After his release, Abbas is consumed by a thirst for revenge and a desire for salvation. Amr Saad, Hatem Salah.

programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: Gaber seeks refuge in the distant village of Al Adliyyah, where he is worshipped as the long-awaited figure, but beneath the reverence lies a man on the verge of exposure, haunted by whispers of his own deception. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Our Breakfast Is Unique
programme.desc: Chef Omar Al Watban presents a variety of Ramadan Iftar recipes every day, clearly and simply explaining the ingredients and preparation steps for viewers. Omar Al Watban.

programme.title: Win The Millions
programme.desc: Game Offering a great opportunity to win some cash by getting on the phone and answering questions.

programme.title: Ramez and The Ultimate Level
programme.desc: Ramez Galal returns with a new set of pranks for Ramadan this year, where he hosts a group of entertainment and sports stars to put them through difficult challenges that test their composure. Ramez Galal.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: Returns with a new season that shows the daily lives of Iraqis in a satirical and comedic perspective, highlighting family and social issues, everyday contradictions that people face in every home, and funny situations that reflect societal inconsistencies. Ehsan Dadosh, Ali Jaber.

programme.title: لكنه لي
programme.desc: علاقة تجمع بين (أنورج) الفتى الغني الوسيم، و(راجيش) الفتاة الفقيرة البسيطة، وبينما تنشأ صداقة بينهما، يعاني الثنائي من الثقافات المختلفة والتفرقة العنصرية، حينما يقعا في حب بعضهما البعض. The handsome rich man Anurag falls in love with poor, simple girl Prerna but they face many difficulties because they come from very different worlds.

programme.title: As Much As The Love
programme.desc: Maryam, the successful businesswoman, faces an unexpected challenge. As secrets from her past emerge, threatening the stability of her life, she is left with only two choices: adapt to the new reality or surrender and lose everything. Nelly Karim, Sherif Salama.

programme.title: As Much As The Love
programme.desc: Maryam, the successful businesswoman, faces an unexpected challenge. As secrets from her past emerge, threatening the stability of her life, she is left with only two choices: adapt to the new reality or surrender and lose everything. Nelly Karim, Sherif Salama.

programme.title: It Makes Me Laugh
programme.desc: A devoted father fights to overcome relentless crises that threaten his family's stability. As challenges escalate, he struggles to protect his loved ones and hold his family together with the least sacrifice. Abdullah Al Sadhan, Fakhriya Khamis.

programme.title: It Makes Me Laugh
programme.desc: A devoted father fights to overcome relentless crises that threaten his family's stability. As challenges escalate, he struggles to protect his loved ones and hold his family together with the least sacrifice. Abdullah Al Sadhan, Fakhriya Khamis.

programme.title: Street Food
programme.desc: Food critic and Chef Amr Helmy cooks and tastes the different street foods with a healthy twist. Amr Helmy.

programme.title: Al Nos
programme.desc: In the 1930s, as a skilled pickpocket seeks a new path, fate leads him alongside a band of other pickpockets to fight the British occupation. He rises from a criminal to a legendary symbol of resistance. Ahmed Amin, Asmaa Abulyazeid, Sedky Sakhr, Hamza Al Eily, Donia Sami, Abdel Rahman Mohamed, Hossam Ali, Hossam Ali.

programme.title: Before And After
programme.desc: Set in the world of cosmetic clinics, four partners clash over fame and the true meaning of beauty, as their witty misadventures expose the pressures of success and the fragile bonds behind a rising youth-led venture. Abdel Aziz Al Mesallam, Zahra Alkharji.

programme.title: The Orphan
programme.desc: After his father is killed in a family dispute over inheritance, orphaned Arsan grows up under his uncle Hayel's control.
